task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating successful login using the provided admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Facilities or System Configuration section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays a page or module for managing 'Facilities', 'Practice Facilities', or 'System Configuration' within FreeMED.
The text 'Riverside Family Health Center' is typed into the Facility Name or Name input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the street, city, state, and zip code
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address fields are filled with '2450 River Road' (Street), 'Springfield' (City), 'IL' (State), and '62704' (Zip Code).
The text '2175550198' is typed into the Phone Number input field.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the new facility
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the newly created 'Riverside Family Health Center' appears in the list of saved facilities in the system.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser (e.g., clicking fields, typing in forms) rather than using terminal commands like curl or direct database inserts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeMED application
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows 'localhost/freemed/' and the interface matches the FreeMED EMR system, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved the form rather than just typing the values
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of the form being submitted (e.g., clicking a 'Save' or 'Add' button, followed by a confirmation screen or updated list), not just a screenshot of the filled-out form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create a facility with the exact following details: Name: 'Riverside Family Health Center', Street: '2450 River Road', City: 'Springfield', State: 'IL', Zip Code: '62704', Phone: '2175550198'. Verify these exact strings are entered into the FreeMED interface.
